surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal Python tooling: the finalize_iterate write-gate (finalize_iterate._record_event) and the Group-D D3 audit semantics (group_d._check_d3). No web/UI/startable surface consumes the change; no API route, store mutation, SSE/WS handler, or message contract is touched (backend-affects-frontend rule N/A). Verification is the unit/regression suites — finalize 20, audit-groups 44, record_event 93, plus full shared (2761), compliance (595), iterate (275) — all green at F0.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: finalize rejects an unclassified iterate work_completed event (no FR, no valid change_type+none_reason) BEFORE write
AC-2: rejection is fail-closed — CLI exits 1, nothing written
AC-2: rejection surfaces an actionable error naming the missing field
AC-2: a gate rejection aborts run() steps 2-5 (no dashboard/handoff regen for an unclassified iterate)
AC-5: finalize allows an FR-linked event (affected_frs/new_frs)
AC-5: finalize allows a no-FR event classified via change_type+none_reason
AC-1 defense-in-depth: a present-but-malformed change_type (unfilled placeholder) is rejected even alongside FRs
Idempotency early-return runs BEFORE the gate — a re-run with the same run_id and invalid extras is never re-gated
AC-3: D3 counts an FR delivered in the same event it was introduced (new_frs+affected_frs together)
AC-3: D3 still flags an FR promised via new_frs with no covering affected_frs at all
AC-4: the FR-01.33 webui false-positive is cleared by the same-event D3 fix
behaviors.reason: The monorepo D3 unit test mirrors FR-01.33's exact same-event shape; the live shipwright-webui audit green is a post-merge + marketplace-sync verification owned by sub-iterate C4.
